creator: adam@veda.is
text:
while starting elm (and possibly at other times) a discrepancy
	is detected between the size of the mailbox and the temp file.
	Elm does an emergency bailout, claiming to leave files intact,
	but the mailbox is truncated towards the end.

	[perhaps unrelated, it is now possible to invoke multiple instances
	of elm from different hosts, but this might be solely due to using
	separate temp dirs.]

Fix: 

?
How-To-Repeat: 
	?
